name: Coral Snake Immune Globulin (Horse)
description: North American Coral Snake Antivenin (Equine) is a horse-derived antivenin indicated for the treatment of envenomation caused by North American coral snake bites. It is intravenously administered so that the antivenin binds to and neutralizes coral snake venom.
indication: Indicated for the treatment of envenomation caused by North American coral snakes.
